audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking loudly and with a high pitch, indicating a sense of urgency or excitement.
temporal_description: A man with short dark hair and a dark suit is seen at night, holding a phone to his ear, then later holding a flashlight. He stands still, looking forward, with his gaze occasionally shifting. The scene transitions to a small boat on dark water at night, with three people aboard, one standing at the back and two seated, all dressed in dark clothing. The boat remains motionless, with distant lights visible on the horizon.
